content.full_text:
May 15, 2007

Jerry R. Czuleger
Senior Deputy County Counsel
County of Santa Barbara
105 E. Anapamu Street
Santa Barbara, California 93101

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-070

Dear Mr. Czuleger:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your April 20, 2007, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act,1 as you requested on May 10, 2007. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division

BGL:jgl
I:\AdviceLtrs\07-070

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, Sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
